case_title: EVILIO E GARCIA GOMEZ VS. LEVEL 10 PROFIT INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, EVILIO E GARCIA AS TO DEFENDANT LEVEL 10 PROFIT INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, EVILIO E GARCIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEVEL 10 PROFIT INC. $7,088.36 PRINCIPAL, $874.84 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,188.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
